name: Tell Me To Come 💜
m: Experimental vocal drone and throat singing. The piece features a single male voice performing deep, resonant overtone singing and rhythmic vocalizations. The performance begins with a sustained low-frequency fundamental drone, rich in harmonic overtones that shift in timbre. The vocalist employs circular breathing to maintain a continuous sound. Mid-way through, the texture shifts to rhythmic, percussive glottal stops and chesty grunts, creating a steady pulse. The recording has a natural, dry acoustic with minimal reverberation, emphasizing the intimate, physical textures of the vocal cords and breath. The pitch centers around a low C1 fundamental with shifting resonance in the 400Hz to 1200Hz range. The tempo of the rhythmic section is approximately 85 BPM.

name: Necesassary
m: Sensual world mix. A question without an answer, in many answers. An avant-garde soundscape characterized by heavy, rhythmic breathing and visceral vocalizations. The piece lacks traditional instrumentation, relying entirely on human breath and guttural sounds to create a tense, intimate atmosphere. The tempo is moderate but fluctuates with the intensity of the breathing patterns. The vocal quality is raw and breathy, featuring deep inhalations, sharp exhalations, and rhythmic grunting.  The structure is linear, building in intensity through faster pacing and more aggressive vocal textures.

name: I know you're having sex in there.
m: This trap experiment explores tempo extremes at 1bpm, built on cavernous 808 kicks hitting once per bar. Hi-hats are time-stretched to surreal length, creating ghostly textures. Sparse, suspenseful synths echo over vast silence, while massive sub drops fade slowly, amplifying tension and space.
